understood_request: For each product, show: (1) current stock on hand summed across all locations, (2) reorder point from product details, (3) total units on order from open purchase orders (sum of qty_ordered from po_lines), and (4) net stock movements from WMS (sum of quantity with sign based on movement_type). Grain is one row per product.

mart.ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_product_inventory_summary (product_bk VARCHAR, product_name VARCHAR, sku VARCHAR, reorder_point BIGINT, safety_stock BIGINT, total_qty_on_hand BIGINT, total_units_on_order DOUBLE, net_stock_movements BIGINT, mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_product_inventory_summary; INSERT INTO mart_product_inventory_summary SELECT hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, spd.reorder_point, spd.safety_stock, COALESCE(measures_cte.total_qty_on_hand, 0) AS total_qty_on_hand, COALESCE(po_cte.total_units_on_order, 0) AS total_units_on_order, COALESCE(measures_cte.net_stock_movements, 0) AS net_stock_movements, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_product hp INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL LEFT JOIN (SELECT hp2.product_hk, SUM(DISTINCT sil.qty_on_hand) AS total_qty_on_hand, SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('receipt', 'RECEIPT', 'Receipt') THEN ssmd.quantity WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('shipment', 'SHIPMENT', 'Shipment') THEN -ssmd.quantity WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('adjustment', 'ADJUSTMENT', 'Adjustment') THEN ssmd.quantity ELSE ssmd.quantity END) AS net_stock_movements FROM hub_product hp2 LEFT JOIN lnk_product_location lpl ON hp2.product_hk = lpl.product_hk LEFT JOIN sat_inventory_levels sil ON lpl.product_location_hk = sil.product_location_hk AND sil.load_end_dts IS NULL LEFT JOIN sat_stock_movement_details ssmd ON lpl.product_location_hk = ssmd.product_location_hk AND ssmd.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hp2.product_hk) measures_cte ON hp.product_hk = measures_cte.product_hk LEFT JOIN (SELECT lppo.product_hk, SUM(CAST(spol.qty_ordered AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units_on_order FROM lnk_product_purchase_order lppo LEFT JOIN sat_po_line_details spol ON lppo.product_purchase_order_hk = spol.product_purchase_order_hk AND spol.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY lppo.product_hk) po_cte ON hp.product_hk = po_cte.product_hk GROUP BY hp.product_hk, hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, spd.reorder_point, spd.safety_stock, measures_cte.total_qty_on_hand, measures_cte.net_stock_movements, po_cte.total_units_on_order

aggregations: SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('receipt','RECEIPT','Receipt') THEN ssmd.quantity WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('shipment','SHIPMENT','Shipment') THEN -ssmd.quantity WHEN ssmd.movement_type IN ('adjustment','ADJUSTMENT','Adjustment') THEN ssmd.quantity ELSE ssmd.quantity END) AS net_stock_movements
